conversations.content: For repositories owned by me, remove my stars if they have also been starred by other users.

<function_thought>
To accomplish the task of removing stars from repositories owned by the user if they have also been starred by other users, I need to first retrieve the information about the currently logged in GitHub user. This will help me to know the repositories owned by them. Next, I will query the repositories to determine which ones have been starred by other users. Then, I can proceed to unstar those repositories accordingly. I will first call `get_logged_in_github_user_information` to gather the user's information.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_logged_in_github_user_information()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
